NOTICE OF THE GENERAL ASSIGNMENT FOR THE BENEFIT OF CREDITORS BY DEFENDANT ALIPHCOM DBA JAWBONE (TRANSACTION ID # 17199062) FILED BY OTHER ALIPHCOM (ASSIGNMENT FOR BENEFIT OF CREDITORS) , LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY  (NON-PARTY)

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CONCENTRIX SERVICES CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER SEALING CONFIDENTIAL DOCUMENTS IS DENIED. A PRIVATE CONFIDENTIALITY AGREEMENT DOES NOT NECESSARILY RISE TO THE LEVEL OF AN "OVERRIDING INTEREST" PER CRC 2.550. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MADE A SUFFICIENT SHOWING THAT THERE IS AN OVERRIDING INTEREST OR THAT IT IS UNABLE TO REQUEST A DEFAULT JUDGMENT WITHOUT PUBLICLY DISCLOSING TRULY CONFIDENTIAL AND BUSINESS SENSITIVE INFORMATION. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE TENTATIVE RULING AND COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: G. GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2018 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2018 Continued To Jul-25-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Application For Prove Up Hearing In Support Of Request For Default Judgment And Scheduling Of Court Reporter
Off Calendar Jun-12-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Aliphcom, Inc., dba Jawbone.
Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703.

Nadim G. Hegazi, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Concentrix Services Corporation.
Patrick McLaughlin, Vice President of Global Accounts for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Aliphcom, Inc., dba Jawbone.
Plaintiffs' complaint was filed on February 8, 2017 and served on March 7, 2017.
Default was entered against defendant on June 22, 2017.
DOE defendants were dismissed on October 25, 2017.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Concentrix Services Corporation, and against the Defaulted Defendant Aliphcom, Inc., dba Jawbone, as follows:

Damages - $28,000.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $4,710.40.
Attorney Fees - $8,400.00.
Costs - $450.00.
Total - $41,560.40.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Application For Prove Up Hearing In Support Of Request For Default Judgment And Scheduling Of Court Reporter
Off Calendar Apr-19-2018 Continued To Jun-12-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2018 Continued To Jun-20-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff Concentrix Services Corporations Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Sealing Confidential Documents
Off Calendar Jan-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CONCENTRIX SERVICES CORPORATION'S Motion For An Order Sealing Confidential Documents is DENIED. A private confidentiality agreement does not necessarily rise to the level of an "overriding interest" per CRC 2.550. Plaintiff has not made a sufficient showing that there is an overriding interest or that it is unable to request a default judgment without publicly disclosing truly confidential and business sensitive information.

Counsel for plaintiff is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2017 Continued To May-09-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
